jobs.name: Nurse
responsibilities: Assist patients during registration and clinical assessment
Provide nursing care following standard protocols
Administer medication safely as per nursing council guidelines
Assist doctors during clinical procedures
Maintain accurate patient records and documentation
Provide patient health education and counseling
Ensure infection prevention and control at all times
Respond appropriately during emergency situations
education: B.Sc. in Nursing Science or Diploma in Nursing
experience: Minimum 2 years experience in clinic, diagnostic center, or hospital
additionalRequirements: Ability to use smartphone and mobile applications
Female candidates are encouraged to apply

jobs.name: Paramedic
responsibilities: Provide primary healthcare services at clinic and outreach level
Conduct ANC, PNC, and health screening
Provide first aid and emergency support
Assist GP during clinical procedures
Maintain infection control and waste management
Conduct health and nutrition counseling
education: Diploma in Paramedic / FWV / Medical Assistant from a recognized institute
experience: Minimum 2–3 years experience in hospital or clinic
additionalRequirements: Ability to work in urban community settings

jobs.name: Community Supervisor
responsibilities: Supervise community volunteers and field activities
Track pregnant women, newborns, and NCD cases
Ensure ANC, PNC, EPI and nutrition services
Organize community and courtyard meetings
Coordinate with clinic and ICT teams
Prepare reports and monthly work plans
education: Minimum graduation in any discipline (Management preferred)
experience: Minimum 2 years experience in community or field level work
additionalRequirements: Ability to work with multiple assignments
Male and female both can apply

jobs.name: Counselor (Health & Nutrition)
responsibilities: Provide health and nutrition counseling
Counsel on maternal, child, adolescent health
Provide GBV and mental health related counseling
Maintain confidentiality of client information
Support clinic manager with reports
education: Masters in Food & Nutrition / Public Health / Psychology / Social Science
experience: 2–3 years experience in NGO or clinic-based counseling
additionalRequirements: Willingness to work on-call if required

jobs.name: Medical Technologist
responsibilities: Perform routine and emergency lab tests
Maintain lab equipment and instruments
Ensure availability of reagents and logistics
Prepare lab reports and documentation
Follow infection control protocols
education: Diploma in Medical Technology (Lab) from approved institute
experience: 2–3 years experience in clinic or hospital laboratory
additionalRequirements: Knowledge of biochemical and hematological analyzer
Ability to use smartphone and apps

jobs.name: General Practitioner
responsibilities: Provide outpatient consultation services
Manage primary healthcare cases
Conduct digital patient registration and prescription
Provide on-the-job training to clinic staff
Participate in emergency healthcare services
experience: 2–3 years clinical experience, preferably in urban PHC

jobs.name: Midwife
responsibilities: Provide ANC, PNC and delivery services
Conduct normal vaginal delivery independently
Identify risk pregnancy and refer appropriately
Provide newborn care and resuscitation
Maintain delivery and patient records
education: Diploma in Midwifery with valid BNMC registration
experience: 2–3 years professional experience with minimum 300 NVDs
